# Phone Number Checker API

> Official CheckNumber code examples for a bulk, asynchronous API used to validate phone numbers and evaluate activity-related signals.

Base URL: https://api.checknumber.ai
Authentication: X-API-Key request header

## Workflow

1. Submit: POST https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/tasks with `file` and `task_type=phoneCheck`.
2. Poll: POST https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/gettasks with `task_id`.
3. Download: retrieve `result_url` after status becomes `exported`.

## Variants

- `task_type=phoneCheck` — Phone Number Validation: https://docs.checknumber.ai/phone-number-validation
- `task_type=active_check` — Phone Number Activity Check: https://docs.checknumber.ai/number-active-check
- `task_type=high_value_users` — High-Value User Checker: https://docs.checknumber.ai/high-value-users-checker

## Pricing

Current terms: https://checknumber.ai/pricing
Balance endpoint: GET https://api.checknumber.ai/v1/balance

## Docs

- Canonical documentation: https://docs.checknumber.ai/phone-number-validation
- Dashboard and API keys: https://platform.checknumber.ai

## Code examples

- examples/python
- examples/nodejs
- examples/go
- examples/java
- examples/csharp
- examples/php
- examples/javascript
- examples/shell
